comment: Midnight Midway rules metadata (plan §5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/midway.ts. Design truth: design/tables/midway/BRIEF.md.

skyRideCombo.comment: The Sky Ride (full orbit): repeat loops inside the window escalate ×2 per step; a 3-chain punches the ride pass.

coaster.comment: Completing the full coaster circuit (drop-off sensor into the right inlane).

ghostTrain.comment: Ghost-train subway transit under the field, out past the wheel. Lit (open turnstile) at ball start; one ride consumes the light, then the turnstile must be spun relightSpins times to re-open it — so the dark ride no longer swallows every ball that reaches mid-field.

striker.comment: High striker: the mallet (upper flipper) swings the ball up the wire lane; a→b transit time grades the swing. DING loads a gondola; STRONG or better punches the ride pass.

prizeBooth.comment: Kickout scoop, lit by dropping the tower (bank complete): each capture awards the next prize (wrapping); the PANDA also loads a gondola. Every capture lights the chicken exit.

ferrisWheel.comment: Bonus multiplier: P-A-R-K completions and striker DINGs each load a gondola; a full wheel turns, stepping the multiplier, and the ring resets.

ridePass.comment: Wizard qualifier: punch all five rides — coaster circuit, ghost-train transit, drop-tower cycle, Sky Ride chain, striker STRONG+. Punches persist across balls.

fireworks.comment: Wizard mode: a full ride pass lights the booth; the next booth shot starts it — all switches ×2, coaster circuits pay jackpot.
